name: M365 Guest Users Without Recent Access Review
description: Identifies guest users who have not had access reviewed in the last 90 days
query: SELECT id, user_principal_name, display_name, created_datetime, last_sign_in_datetime FROM entra_users WHERE user_type = 'Guest' AND (last_access_review IS NULL OR last_access_review < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days')
remediation: Conduct regular access reviews for guest users. Remove guest accounts that are no longer needed.
